name: brainstorm_templates
outcome_goal: Brainstorm app templates, registry gaps, and concrete manifest JSON for the app builder

jobs.label: brainstorm_templates_opus
jobs.prompt:
We have a self-configuring app builder with a 4x4 quadrant grid. Each quadrant holds a module. We have 20 modules:

Display: metric, stat-row, chart, activity-feed, status-grid, markdown, key-value
Input: text-input, intent-box, dropdown-select, button-row, file-drop
Tool: dispatch-form, search-panel, document-processor, data-pipeline
Composite: workflow-status, bug-card, model-card, registry-browser

Modules can span 1x1, 2x1, 1x2, or 2x2 quadrants. Quadrants addressed A1-D4.

Design 20 app templates. For each provide:
- id (kebab-case)
- name
- description (2 sentences, include keywords users would search for)
- quadrant layout: which module in which quadrant, with spans

Categories to cover: business (CRM, invoicing, inventory), productivity (tasks, notes, calendar), developer (bug tracker, API monitor, deploy status), analytics (KPI dashboard, sales pipeline, user metrics), content (blog manager, social media, email campaigns), team (standup board, hiring pipeline, OKR tracker).

Output as a JSON array of objects with keys: id, name, description, quadrants (object mapping quadrant IDs to {module, span?, config?}).

jobs.label: brainstorm_registry_gaps_gemini
jobs.prompt:
We have a self-configuring app builder. The registries currently have:

UI Components (10): drag_and_drop_canvas, text_box, table, icon, box, color_scheme, chart, text_format, button, dropdown

Calculations (4): schema_charts_rollups, platform_datasets, platform_algos, common_calcs

Workflows (12): brainstorming, research, coding_workflow, personal_workflow, collateral_creation, hitl, schedule_based, triggers_and_actions, workflow_composition, data_splitting_logging, handoff_mechanisms, instructions_by_tool

What's missing? Think about what you'd need to build: a CRM, a project tracker, an analytics dashboard, a content calendar, an invoicing tool, a hiring pipeline, a support ticket system.

For each gap, provide:
- id (kebab-case)
- name
- description (rich, include synonyms and use cases so tsvector search matches)
- category
- which registry it belongs to (ui_component, calculation, or workflow)

Also: update descriptions for ALL 26 existing entries to be richer — include synonyms, use cases, and related terms so search works. Output as JSON with two arrays: 'new_entries' and 'updated_descriptions'.

jobs.label: brainstorm_manifests_gpt
